data.title: US Department of Justice seizes $200,000 in crypto assets linked to Hamas
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) announced the seizure of approximately $200,000 in cryptocurrency as part of an operation to combat Hamas's financing network. The DOJ pointed out that the funds were USDT and came from wallets associated with Hamas and its affiliated organizations. Since October 2024, these addresses have received a total of more than $1.5 million in cryptocurrency, behind which is an organized fundraising operation. The funds were transferred to a main wallet and transferred through multiple exchanges and over-the-counter traders in an attempt to conceal the flow of funds.

data.title: Arkham: US government transfers $1.77 million worth of ETH
data.description:
According to Arkham monitoring, the US government has just transferred about $1.77 million worth of Ethereum (ETH) from the "Sae-Heng Confiscated Funds" address. 
First, a test transaction worth $1 was sent to the address: 0xBf7f...c74b, and about ten minutes later, $1.77 million in ETH from the Sae-Heng Confiscated Funds address (0x17f) was transferred to the 0xBf7 address.

data.title: Constellation, a blockchain company approved by the U.S. Department of Defense, launches a "digital evidence" compliance system
data.description: Constellation Network, a US blockchain infrastructure company, recently released the "Digital Evidence" system, which is based on blockchain technology and aims to provide law enforcement and public service agencies with tamper-proof data storage solutions. The company has previously worked with the US Department of Defense to develop the "Iron SPIDR" project for six years. The system can be used for data collection in scenes such as police vehicles and fire equipment, and can be integrated with Panasonic TOUGHBOOK devices. Constellation said that the technology can help agencies reduce compliance costs, and the "smart authentication" tags it generates can improve data credibility. Currently, the system is being tested in multiple pilot scenarios, including public safety, retail analysis, and intellectual property protection.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: April will be a turning point for the market, and a new round of market growth is coming
data.description: Arthur Hayes, co-founder of BitMEX, said that April will be a turning point for the market and predicted that a new round of market growth is coming. Hayes believes that Trump's tariff policy will not affect the Fed's decision-making, the money printing machine will continue to operate, and a new round of global liquidity will be released.

data.title: Sei Foundation explores takeover of bankrupt 23andMe in ‘boldest DeSci bet yet’
data.description:
23andMe, the genetic testing company that went public in 2021, announced on March 23 that it was filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/348546/sei-foundation-explores-takeover-of-bankrupt-23andme-in-boldest-desci-bet-yet?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: EU Considers Retaliation Against U.S. Tariffs on Auto Industry
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the European Union is contemplating measures against U.S. service exports, particularly targeting major tech companies, in response to U.S. President Donald Trump's imposition of a 25% tariff on the automotive industry. An EU diplomat stated that while the U.S. believes it holds an advantage in the trade conflict, the EU is equally capable of escalating the situation. The ultimate aim is to ease tensions through a comprehensive trade agreement. Potential retaliatory actions may include restricting intellectual property rights of large tech firms and prohibiting Elon Musk's Starlink satellite network from securing government contracts. Italy is already reconsidering its decision to purchase the system.

data.title: XRP Open Interest Has Surged 36% In Two Weeks – Is Momentum Building?
data.description:
XRP is trading above key support levels after several days of intense volatility driven by macroeconomic concerns and mounting trade war fears. Since March 11, XRP has jumped more than 35%, showing signs of renewed strength as bulls attempt to reclaim higher price levels and ignite a fresh rally. The move comes at a time when broader altcoin sentiment remains fragile, with no clear direction for the market in the weeks ahead. Related Reading: Ethereum Reclaims Realized Price – Bulls Face Strong Resistance At $2,300 Despite the uncertain landscape, XRP’s recent price action has caught the attention of traders and analysts alike
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ripple/xrp-open-interest-has-surged-36-in-two-weeks-is-momentum-building/

data.title: US government moves all Bitcoin from the Sae-Heng confiscated funds wallet
data.description:
The US Government moved Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) from the confiscated funds of Sae-Heng, a person involved with confidence scams.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-government-moves-all-bitcoin-from-the-sae-heng-confiscated-funds-wallet/
